description: The ValueNoiseClip component takes completely random noise and turns it into audio data. The best way to describe the noise would be like TV static.

fields.Seed: The seed for the random audio noise.

methods.BakeClip: Turns the audio into a StaticAudioClip.

usage: Attach to a slot and provide a ``Frequency`` and ``Amplitude``, then insert into a AudioClipPlayer to hear it.
